dct_title_s: Palestine, or the Holyland, or the land of Canaan
dct_description_sm: Relief shown by hachures and pictorially.
Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian.
Bar scale on map given in "Hebrew miles" and "British statute miles".
Shows topography, drainage, locations of the tribes of Israel, travel routes, places of historical interest.
Includes descriptive text and a legend: Explanation.
Appears in Jeremiah Greenleaf's A new universal atlas, comprising separate maps of all the empires, kingdoms, & state throughout the world, etc., 1840.
